original_image_tags: Aged, off-white paper page showing the reverse side of a document. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top center. The page contains multiple overlapping, stamped ink notations and faint, reversed text bleeding through from the other side.

elements.description: A blank or faded page with visible bleed-through text from the reverse side. Several blue ink stamps are visible, including 'RECEIVED LIAISON SECTION Aug 18 9 18 AM '47 F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'RECEIVED Aug 15 4 38 PM '47 INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I.', and an upside-down stamp 'RECEIVED-TAPIN F.B.T. Aug 9 11 01 AM '47'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content of ink stamps and bleed-through text, but Description B provides specific quoted text for the stamps while Description A only mentions generic overlapping stamps without quoting any text, which is a detail omission rather than a contradiction.
